Know What You Missed, Catch Up Faster

Agendier turns your official university timetable into a live dashboard for your whole semester — today’s classes at a glance, attendance risk you can act on before it costs you, and missed lectures you can find and review fast. Session notes, Pomodoro focus sprints, an AI assistant, and Google Calendar sync keep everything in one place.
